prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap industrial stocks like Deere & Company (DE), I assumed an annualized volatility of approximately 25%. For an 18-day horizon, this translates to roughly 5.3% standard deviation. The point estimate reflects a slight upward bias considering DE's historical trend and seasonal factors in agricultural equipment demand. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal distribution of returns.
